strengths: EN/ES heading and link parity is near-perfect across all three pairs, with no structural drift between languages
All pairs carry quick/validation/troubleshooting/related/next flags, giving readers consistent navigational scaffolding
gaps: The index.md links to ./tutorial/routing.md in both languages, but that file does not appear in the tutorial headings listed — its existence should be confirmed to avoid 404s

feature-matrix.md links to several files (architecture.md, security-model.md, function-spec.md, builtin-functions.md) that are not present in any pair's confirmed listing, creating potential dead-link risk
fixes: Audit all linked targets in feature-matrix.md (architecture.md, security-model.md, articles/polyglot-nextstyle-apis.md, tutorial/qr-in-python-node.md) and confirm they exist before publication, or replace with confirmed live paths
In typed-inputs-and-responses.md, the ES version links to ./routing.md (not localized), which may be intentional but should be verified — if a localized equivalent exists, use it for consistency
